heroTitle: Digital Career Identity & Income Passport for India's Informal Workforce
heroSubtitle: RozgaarAI helps workers turn real-world experience into trusted digital credentials, verified skills, employment history, income records, better work opportunities, and interview readiness.

demoMode.title: Explore Demo Workers
demoMode.subtitle: Choose any worker below to experience the complete RozgaarAI journey, from AI onboarding to employment.
demoMode.bannerCopy: Explore complete worker journeys instantly. No login required.
demoMode.loaded: Demo Mode active: {name}'s complete worker profile is loaded.

auth.copy: Login is optional for Demo Mode. Production mode supports secure accounts, persistent profiles, and database-backed worker records.
auth.name: Full name
auth.required: Please enter the required account details.
auth.success: {role} account ready. Production records will use database storage when credentials are configured.
auth.demoCta: Create an account to save real worker profiles.

landing.problemTitle: Workers often have experience, but not formal resumes, proof of work, verified skills, income history, or interview confidence.
problems: Many workers cannot show experience in a format employers trust.
Skills remain invisible outside word-of-mouth networks.
Deposits, fake employers, and unclear addresses create real risk.
Workers often negotiate without local wage benchmarks.
English-first systems exclude first-time and low-literacy workers.
Workers know the job but may struggle to present themselves.
landing.journeyTitle: From spoken details to a trusted income and employment passport
landing.featuresTitle: A complete AI employment stack for workers, employers, and NGOs
features: Workers can speak in Hindi or English and the app structures their details.
A verified, QR-enabled profile that travels with the worker.
ATS-friendly resumes generated from real work experience.
Certificate-style proof for role, experience, and verification ID.
Every match shows skill, location, wage, language, and safety logic.
Local wage guidance based on city, role, and experience.
Role-specific questions, sample answers, scoring, and feedback.
Search, review, shortlist, and contact verified workers.
Outcome analytics for NGOs, funders, and public-sector pilots.
landing.storyTitle: Asha Kumari goes from informal experience to a shareable career identity
storySteps: Asha speaks her work history in Hindi.
RozgaarAI turns her experience into a professional resume.
She receives a verified QR career card.
Employers can scan, review, and contact safely.
Asha practices clear answers before the call.
Her skill, wage expectation, and availability are clear.
landing.employerTitle: Find verified workers with context before the first call
landing.ngoTitle: Outcome intelligence for scalable livelihoods programs
landing.testimonialsTitle: Designed for trust across the employment ecosystem
testimonials: For the first time, I can share my work experience like a professional profile.
The QR profile and wage estimate make the first conversation faster and safer.
RozgaarAI gives field teams a clear way to onboard workers and track outcomes.
landing.ctaTitle: Empowering India’s Informal Workforce with AI
landing.ctaCopy: Create a worker identity, generate a resume, verify job safety, and start interview practice in one polished demo flow.

careerIdentity.title: Digital Career Identity
careerIdentity.subtitle: Verified AI-powered worker profile
careerIdentity.scanPublicProfile: Scan to view public worker profile.
careerIdentity.qrHint: Open a verified worker profile with resume, skills, availability, and contact information.
careerIdentity.qrAlt: QR code for public worker profile
careerIdentity.issuedBy: Issued by RozgaarAI Digital Career Identity Network

skillUpgradeSuggestions.Driver: EV driving and app-based fleet training

guidedDemo.title: Eight steps judges can follow in five minutes
guidedDemo.copy: Use this flow to show RozgaarAI’s reliability even when AI keys, voice support, or a database are unavailable.
steps: Worker enters or speaks basic details.
Fallback AI logic structures the worker profile.
A clean resume is created in the selected language.
A public worker profile opens from the QR link.
Explainable matches show skill, city, wage, language, and safety.
Role-specific questions and feedback prepare the worker.
Employer dashboard searches and shortlists verified workers.
Judges see outcomes for NGOs, workers, and public programs.

demoProfiles.title: Load realistic demo profile
demoProfiles.hint: Switch personas instantly for a reliable judge walkthrough.

onboardingTitle: Enter details by voice or text
sampleHelp: Speak or type your own work details. RozgaarAI will structure them into a verified worker profile.

smartInput.title: Smart voice/text input
smartInput.hint: Paste or speak a sentence. RozgaarAI extracts name, city, skill, experience, language, wage, and availability.
smartInput.placeholder: Example: My name is Ramesh Patel. I am a plumber from Bhopal. I have worked for five years.

placeholders.workDetails: Write work history, skills, and experience

productFlow.title: One clear path to better work
steps: Voice or text becomes a structured worker profile
Record wages, received payments, and pending amounts
Check risky offers and document requests
Share a verified worker profile with employers

dashboardTitle: Create Profile → Work Matches → Wage Tracker → Rights Help → Digital Worker Card

passport.title: Verified work history and income timeline
passport.copy: A simple record of employers, work type, location, days worked, wages, received payments, and pending payments.
passport.trustedSummary: This passport helps workers demonstrate credibility through verified work and income history.

shareProfile.title: Shareable Profile Summary
shareProfile.copy: A simple verified profile workers can share with employers by link or QR.

practiceHint: Generate practical questions for the worker role.
profileTitle: Career identity that workers can share

certificate.title: Verified worker profile card generated from the AI profile
certificate.name: Digital Worker Card
certificate.copy: This worker card is generated from the worker's AI profile, stated experience, availability, skill signals, and RozgaarAI verification logic.
certificate.downloadTitle: Download or share the worker card
certificate.downloadCopy: Use this as proof of worker identity for employers, NGOs, and onboarding partners.

jobsTitle: Job matching based on skill, city, experience, and wage
safetyTitle: Check job safety, pending payments, and document requests before accepting work

riskFlags.Asks for registration money before joini: Asks for registration money before joining
riskFlags.Salary looks unrealistic for an informal: Salary looks unrealistic for an informal role

riskAdvice: Do not pay money or share original documents. Ask for employer address, company proof, written wage terms, and an interview before sending documents.
mockInterviewHelp: Questions adapt to the worker profile and can be practiced in Hindi or English.
practiceEmpty: Start practice to generate role-specific questions and feedback.

interviewCoach.tagline: Practice employer questions in your language and improve your confidence before the first call.
interviewCoach.noHistory: No practice history yet. Start a session to build confidence.
interviewCoach.readinessBoost: Interview practice improves your Employment Readiness Score.
interviewCoach.answerRequired: Please type or speak an answer before scoring.

modeHelp.simulation: One employer question at a time

interviewAnswer.label: Your answer
interviewAnswer.hint: Type or paste an answer to get feedback.
interviewAnswer.placeholder: Example: I arrive on time, confirm tasks clearly, and have handled cleaning and elderly care for four years.

stakeholders.title: For Workers
stakeholders.copy: Build a portable career identity, understand fair wages, and apply to safer jobs.

stakeholders.title: For Employers
stakeholders.copy: Review worker profile, skill signals, experience, wage expectations, and availability before the first call.

stakeholders.title: For NGOs
stakeholders.copy: Onboard communities faster, track outcomes, and support first-time workers.

impactTitle: National-scale outcomes for workers, NGOs, and employers
impactCards: Reduces dependence on verbal-only work history.
Flags risky job offers before deposits or document handover.
Gives workers a shareable profile across cities and employers.
finalTitle: Create a digital career identity in minutes.
finalCopy: RozgaarAI is ready for a hackathon demo, field pilot, or NGO-assisted onboarding session.
profileSuccess: Profile created and saved. Work matches, wage guidance, and digital worker card are ready.
profileError: Something went wrong. Local demo logic is still available, please try again.
voiceUnsupported: Voice input is not supported in this browser. Please type your answer.
missingProfileFields: Please add name, city, primary skill, and experience before creating the profile.
generateProfileFirst: Create a worker profile first to unlock this section.
emptyProfileTitle: Create a profile to unlock your worker workspace
emptyProfileSummary: Once the worker profile is created, RozgaarAI will show verified skills, work matches, wage guidance, rights help, and a digital worker card.

emptyDashboard.title: No worker profile yet
emptyDashboard.copy: Start with voice or text input. After the profile is created, this workspace will show work recommendations, wage tracking, rights help, and the digital worker card.

emptyJobs: No suitable job matches found yet. Try changing city, skill, or expected wage.
emptyWageTitle: Fair wage estimate is not ready yet
emptyWage: Create a profile to estimate fair wage and start tracking daily payments.

wageEntry.title: Track daily wage
wageEntry.copy: Save each workday to build a real income history on this device.
wageEntry.empty: No wage entries yet. Add today's work to start building an income record.
wageEntry.success: Wage entry saved on this device.
wageEntry.error: Add a work date and daily wage to save this entry.

emptyCoach: No interview questions yet. Start practice to generate role-specific coaching.
emptyRisk: Enter an offer message to check risk signals.
speechUnsupported: Speech recognition is not supported in this browser. Please use text input.
answerFallback: Answer with a short real example and clear wage expectations.
